top_signals.title: Switzerland loses its shine as central bank gold vault
top_signals.summary: After banks were net sellers in March, they added a net 17 tonnes of gold in April, led mainly by Poland and China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Barclays sees gold pullback as ‘reset’, keeps bullish outlook
top_signals.summary: According to the bank, the recent correction has not altered the key drivers underpinning the gold bull market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: CNBC to simulcast 11 WNBA games this season
top_signals.summary: The simulcasts will expose the WNBA to an affluent audience on CNBC and marks a new chapter for the business news network after it spun out from Comcast.
